title: vicia lanceolata
intro: Vicia lanceolata, also known as winter vetch or narrow-leaved vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Vicia lanceolata include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Vicia lanceolata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support respiratory health and relieve cold and flu symptoms.
